prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 数学/统计类专业社会热度为"推荐"，计算机/软件/人工智能类为"高 热推荐"，电子信息/通信为"高热推荐"，这些专业大类与珠海校区物理类招生方向高度相关，社会热度高。吉林省2026年高考总考生约110868人，较2025年微降约0.56%，物理类 考生估算约79970人，竞争压力略有缓和。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合扩招12.5%（推动位次后移）、考生总数微降（推动位次前移）、相关专业 社会热度高（推动竞争加剧）等因素，扩招效应略大于考生减少效应，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年（3450名）小幅后移。预测最低录取位次约3724名，位次区间3277-4171 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) only has admission data for 2025 in Jilin Province Physics Category, with a minimum ranking of approximately 3450. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 3450; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 8 students in 2025, and increased to 9 students in 2026, an expansion of 12.5%. Expansion means more admission slots, slightly easing competition pressure, pushing the ranking backward (numerical increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 19th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings main list, belonging to the top-tier normal universities in China. The Zhuhai Campus shares the same educational system as the main campus, benefiting from the main campus's disciplinary resources and brand reputation; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion incidents; Douyin school popularity ranking is 37th, rated as 'relatively hot', with mid-to-high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high candidate attention; Beijing Normal University has numerous A-level disciplines including Mathematics A, Physics A-, Geography A+, Psychology A+, Statistics A, and Systems Science A-. The Physics Category enrollment majors at Zhuhai Campus (Mathematics, Science Experimental Class, Social Science Experimental Class) highly correspond to these advantageous disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Mathematics/Statistics majors have a social popularity rating of 'recommended', Computer/Software/Artificial Intelligence majors are 'highly recommended', and Electronics/Information/Communication majors are 'highly recommended'. These major categories are highly relevant to the Physics Category enrollment directions at Zhuhai Campus, with high social popularity. The total number of Jilin Province 2026 Gaokao examinees is approximately 110,868, a slight decrease of about 0.56% from 2025, with an estimated 79,970 Physics Category examinees, slightly easing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as a 12.5% enrollment expansion (pushing ranking backward), a slight decrease in total examinees (pushing ranking forward), and high social popularity of related majors (intensifying competition), the expansion effect slightly outweighs the examinee reduction effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025 (3450). The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 3724, with a ranking range of 3277-4171.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Geography, Psychology, Biological Sciences, Chemistry)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Economics (Data Science Direction), Financial Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Systems Science and Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Applied Statistics, Artificial Intelligence (Innovation Experimental Class)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Among the three Physics Category majors, the Mathematics Class covers popular directions such as Mathematics, Data Science, and Artificial Intelligence, with the highest social popularity, but its 2025 admission ranking (3450) is actually the lowest (easiest to enter), so it is recommended as the main target. The Science Experimental Class (3040) and Social Science Experimental Class (3336) have higher admission rankings (more difficult to enter) and can be used as sprint choices. For rankings within the predicted range (3277-4171), it is recommended to focus on the Mathematics Class, supplemented by the Science Experimental Class and Social Science Experimental Class.
